Name: Geeta University
Description: Geeta University is a prominent educational institution located in Panipat, Haryana. It focuses on providing modern education and skill development, offering specialized courses in mobile application development, including Kotlin and React Native, to prepare students for the tech industry.
Courses Provided: Kotlin App Development, React Native App Development

Name: Ambala College of Engineering
Description: Ambala College of Engineering and Applied Research, situated in Ambala, Haryana, is dedicated to fostering technical excellence. The institution focuses on advanced technological education and offers specialized training programs like Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning for faculty development.

Name: Panjab University
Description: Panjab University, located in Chandigarh, India, is a highly esteemed and historic educational institution. Known for its strong academic foundation and research-oriented approach, it offers a wide variety of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs across multiple disciplines.

Name: SD College
Description: SD College is a premier higher education institution situated in Ambala, Haryana. Committed to academic excellence, the college provides a robust learning environment and frequently organizes professional faculty development programs, such as training workshops on Microsoft Power BI.

Name: Chandigarh University
Description: Chandigarh University is a leading private educational institution located in Chandigarh, India. It is highly recognized for its extensive campus, diverse academic programs, strong industry partnerships, and commitment to delivering quality higher education and exceptional placement opportunities.

Name: CGC Landran
Description: Chandigarh Group of Colleges (CGC) Landran is a well-known educational campus situated in Chandigarh, India. It offers a vibrant academic atmosphere and provides numerous programs in engineering, management, and technology, focusing strongly on student placements and industry readiness.

Name: JMIETI
Description: JMIETI is a technical and engineering institute located in Radaur. The college is committed to equipping students with cutting-edge skills, offering specialized training workshops and courses in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and MERN Stack Development for aspiring professionals.
Courses Provided: Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning (AI-ML), MERN Stack Development Workshop

Name: JMIT
Description: JMIT is a dedicated engineering and technology institute located in Radaur. Focused on ensuring student success and career readiness, the institution actively provides comprehensive placement preparation programs, including specialized training for TCS Ninja, Digital, and Prime placements.
Courses Provided: TCS Ninja, Digital & Prime Placement Preparation Program

Name: GLA university
Description: GLA University is a prestigious educational institution situated in Mathura. It is dedicated to delivering high-quality technical education and offers advanced courses such as AI-Powered Full Stack Development and MERN Stack training to enhance modern software engineering skills.
Courses Provided: Advanced MERN Stack & AI-Powered Full Stack Development
